zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mayse於1567年6月23日出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾可頓哈姆時，她的父親Henry Mayse47歲，母親Margaret Woodborne32歲。她於1588年6月23日與William Coolidge在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年2月11日在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾可頓哈姆哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Mayse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mayes
meanings: English: variant of May 1, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mayse was born on 23 June 1567, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Mayse, was 47 and her mother, Margaret Woodborne, was 32. She married William Coolidge on 23 June 1588, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 11 February 1620, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in All Saints Church, Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mayse est née le 23 juin 1567, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Mayse, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Woodborne, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Coolidge le 23 juin 1588, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1620, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints Church, Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mayse(이)가 1567년 6월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Mayse(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Woodborne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1588년 6월 23일 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 William Coolidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 2월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 컷함 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mayse nasceu em 23 de junho de 1567, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Mayse, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Woodborne, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William Coolidge em 23 de junho de 1588, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1620, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints Church, Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mayse родилась 23 июня 1567 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Mayse было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Woodborne, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Coolidge 23 июня 1588 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 11 февраля 1620 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц чурч, коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.
